noveltyJustification: Converted established causes into one canonical namespace decision, an artifact ownership split, exact mutation targets, dependency order, and acceptance gates.
focus: Answer Q5 with the prioritized implementable sk-doc routing fix list in dependency order.

label: Public leaves are workflow-paired packet-local IDs
Authored router plus generated recursive manifest
Bundles capped to selected map union
sk-doc hub packet and template contracts
benchmark replay loader scorer and runner
Canonical public leaf identity is workflowMode plus packet-root-relative leafResourceId; packet-qualified paths remain internal load addresses.
Resource-bearing hubs need an authored second-layer intent router and a generated recursive leaf manifest with shared aliases.
Positive fixture gold must resolve through the current router and manifest before any scenario dispatch.
Bundle enforcement should allow only the selected RESOURCE_MAP union and reserve full inventory for an explicit named intent.
Every scored row must carry exact normalized routes and source/config hashes; report emission fails closed when provenance is absent.
sk-doc command-metadata.json should remain absent because it is optional and unrelated to all measured failure classes.
Internal load address and public leaf identifier are different path types and must never share one untyped field.
Semantic intent maps are authored per hub; recursive topology manifests are generated and drift-checked.
Gold cleanup follows namespace and topology contracts, never precedes them.
The 6 wrong-root, 6 missing-leaf, and 5 over-bundle classes require separate controls; the 2 clean rows are regressions.

reason: Packet routers and benchmark gold already use packet-root-relative IDs; pairing with workflowMode resolves collisions without leaking internal load addresses.

direction: Generate semantic RESOURCE_MAP membership from file discovery
reason: Discovery proves topology but cannot infer which leaf is relevant to an intent; scaffold the router and author its mappings per hub.

direction: Create sk-doc command-metadata.json as part of routing repair
reason: The artifact is optional, its drift guard is pending, and it addresses none of the measured namespace, leaf, bundle, or provenance failures.
